title: Titan Company is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Titan Company is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Titan Company! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Titan Company:
Titan Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Titan Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
